question: Implement a program that checks if a user-entered integer is positive, negative, or zero using if-else if-else statements.
driver: int main() { std::string input; std::getline(std::cin, input); std::stringstream ss(input); int num; ss >> num; if (num > 0) { std::cout << "Positive" << std::endl; } else if (num < 0) { std::cout << "Negative" << std::endl; } else { std::cout << "Zero" << std::endl; } return 0; }
errors: Missing semicolon after 'std::cout << "Positive"' statement in the first 'if' block. This prevents compilation.
